coverage_note: The bundled ATM population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ATM DNA double-strand break signaling, checkpoint kinase cascades, p53 activation, radiosensitivity, and genome stability and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000149311: ATM coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ATM findings should be read against DNA double-strand break signaling, checkpoint kinase cascades, p53 activation, radiosensitivity, and genome stability; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

ATM loss-of-function model is curated as a ATM marker for Ataxia-telangiectasia and carrier review context, Hereditary cancer susceptibility context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs1801516 (ATM D1853N) is curated as a ATM marker for Ataxia-telangiectasia and carrier review context, Hereditary cancer susceptibility context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
